description:
DLSS Swapper swap DLSS dlls in games.

DLSS Swapper is a tool that allows you to conveniently download, manage, and swap DLSS dlls allowing you to upgrade or downgrade DLSS version in a game without the game needing an update.
This is a small update to fix Epic Games Store games not showing, and a few minor quality of life updates.
Changelog
- Update SQLite to fix CVE-2025-6965 + update all other nugets (by @beeradmoore in #901)
- Fixes issue of dlss_g not being part of compiled app (by @beeradmoore in #900)
- Change how we detect if an EGS game is an addon or not (by @beeradmoore in #903)
- Fixed layout for RTL text in download panel (by @beeradmoore in #905)

Translation related updates
- Updated Russian translations (by @Artemoq via @beeradmoore in #896)
- Updated Thai Translations (by @xXBNXx0 via @beeradmoore in #897)
- Updated Persian translations (by @zaniar-z via @beeradmoore in #898)
